title: Eurus
description:
A modpack with light 'medieval fantasy' theming;
Primarily focused on open ended exploration, building, and farming.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d2e251d9f947aa04e07ecf52bba9baad85a1ad4.png)

A modpack with light 'medieval fantasy' theming;
Primarily focused on open ended exploration, building, and farming.
### Main features : ![Landscape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffc839a041bc6726087c4e868f67d46b6b030e29.png) ### Vast and interesting landscapes with Tectonic and Terralith.
(Distant Horizons included)
![Ship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/731501be06003624204d03c340452a52f7c008f5.png) ### Build and sail your own ship with the Eureka! Ships! mod.
![Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/177a2cb956d9744330c4b45fbde8774184c25e5e.png) ### Armor & weapons from the Epic Knights mod.
#### Create mod + addons.
#### Expanded farming and cooking with Farmer's Delight and other farming mods.
#### Added ambience with Sound Physics Remastered, Falling Leaves, and more.
Optional additions & changes :

Visuals :

Resource Packs

Ashen or Cocricot + Motschen's Better Leaves

Shaders:

Shader compatibility list
 Photon Shaders

Gameplay :

Eureka! Ships! + Valkyrien Skies is in alpha and can experience bugs.
You can optionally swap it out for Small Ships mod or similar.
Physics mod's wave physics works well with Eureka! Ships! (potentially unstable).

Known issues : Sit mod doesn't work on Valkyrien Skies structures.
Footstep sounds don't work on Valkyrien Skies structures.
Certain shader pack incompatibility with Distant Horizons.
(Read the shader compatibility list for reference)
Structure generation sometimes behaving strangely.
![Banner that says "WORK IN PROGRESS!".](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7faad68c54a38769868e5c8c59c181932b2f1515.png)
